title: YOUEON 16 Pack Living Bud Vases Clear Glass Flower Vase 8 Oz Decorative Glass Bottles Small Vintage Flower Bottle Table Centrepiece Decoration for Home Wedding Party Event Office Modern Decor Clear
features: Our set of 16 living bud vase measure 6 x 13 cm(DX H), bud bottles have a thin neck and sturdy base to stand well and easily being held. Sufficient quantities are enough to meet your need.

Wide range of uses: This glass vase set can be used for long-stemmed flowers or as centerpieces for home decorations, farmhouse home decor, table decor, wedding, party, hotel, restaurant, cafes. These mini bud vases make flower arranging fun and easy.

Clear Appearance: Made of high-quality, lead-free and environmentally friendly glass, our flower vase is clear enough for you to see the individual stems vividly from clear glass. Feel the nature inside your home.

Simple but Classic Design: The curved neck of the glass bud vase widens to a 0.75 in diameter bottle that's perfect for displaying artificial or cut flowers. With a simple, clear glass design, these light weight bud vases make flower arranging fun and easy, and even elegant to look at without flowers.

For DIY Use: Apart from using the classic glass bottles for flowers, you can work your magic on it as well. It can be filled with artificial flowers, pebbles, and candles, handcrafted arts, tied with rope or painted with colors for a unique DIY project. Have it for your own or send as a gift on Mother's Day, Thanksgiving, Anniversaries, Weddings or Housewarmings.
